description: A sophisticated, high-utility header. Features the KinYellow logo (Gold and Slate) on the left. The center contains a ui/navigation-menu with dropdowns for 'Cultures', 'Identities', and 'States'. The right side features a 'List Your Business' button with a subtle gold pulse effect. The header uses a solid bg-background initially, transitioning to bg-background/80 with backdrop-blur-md on scroll. 1px bottom border in Slate/10 for definition.
